Class MapGraph

java.lang.Object
com.risk.services.MapGraph
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MapGraph extends Object implements Serializable
This MapGraph class contains all the methods to add , remove countries , continents and also to add , delete edges between countries. This also contains methods to set and get the adjacent countries list.
Author:
Karandeep Singh, Ruthvik Shandilya
See Also:
